news.paragraph: UVXY, a volatility-focused ETF, is currently trading around $35.28. Recent headlines highlight its nature as a leveraged ETF designed to profit from VIX spikes and market fear, with one article specifically warning investors to stop trading certain leveraged ETFs built to lose. This suggests that while UVXY can be a tool for trading volatility, its structure carries inherent risks and potential for significant losses, especially over the long term.

headlines.title: Stop Trading These 10 Leveraged ETFs Built to Lose
2 Ways To Profit as the VIX Spikes — No Matter What Comes Next
The VIX Spikes as Investors Panic: 3 ETFs to Trade Market Fear Now
